name: hhq
description: Helper HQ — a family of AI-assisted helpers for solo founders, coaches, and consultants. V1 ships the Sales Helper: open a chat, ask for the next 5 prospects, and get short tailored opening messages drafted from real signals (LinkedIn posts, recent activity, role changes). Human-in-the-loop by design — the plugin prepares, you review and send. Tier (lite / pro / elite) and helper access (sales / future marketing / future ops) are gated by a server-issued signed token; V1 dogfood ships with auth checks stubbed.
